findings.message: The GraphQL field `name` on the `Item` type was renamed to `title`. In code-first Strawberry this directly renames the exposed schema field, removing `name` from the schema. Any client still querying `Item.name` will break with a validation error, and there is no compatible path (the old field is gone, not deprecated/aliased).
findings.suggestion: Keep `name` as a (deprecated) field alongside `title` during a migration window, e.g. retain `name: str` and add `title` as a resolver returning the same value with `@strawberry.field(deprecation_reason="use `title`")`, then remove `name` only after clients have migrated.
